title: Command Craft
body:
I don't have an open discord server

Made with MCreator

# Description
Added
1. 11 new blocks
2. 20 pieces of equipment
3. 18 items
4. 5 creatures
5. 2 tools
6. 2 dimensions
7. 2 biomes
8. and 1 enchantment

---

Endstone useless? Not anymore! You can use the End Stone Source Extractor to extract the End Stone Alloy Source to make stronger equipment. Using an end alloy block can be used to craft a portal with the materials needed to make a command block, will you stop or go deeper? Become a legend or forgotten in history? The choice is yours.

---

**Download this for more content!**
